tasks.label: android-build-if-changed
args: if [ -z "$JAVA_HOME" ]; then export JAVA_HOME=$(/usr/libexec/java_home -v 21 2>/dev/null || { [ -d /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ] && echo /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 || echo /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21; }); fi && ./gradlew assembleDebug

tasks.label: android-build-show-device
args: if [ -z "$JAVA_HOME" ]; then export JAVA_HOME=$(/usr/libexec/java_home -v 21 2>/dev/null || { [ -d /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ] && echo /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 || echo /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21; }); fi && bash build-and-select.sh

tasks.label: android-build-and-launch
args: if [ -z "$JAVA_HOME" ]; then export JAVA_HOME=$(/usr/libexec/java_home -v 21 2>/dev/null || { [ -d /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ] && echo /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 || echo /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21; }); fi && bash build-and-launch.sh
